faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Rye, NY?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Rye typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, property size, and number of treatment visits required. Initial inspections help us provide accurate pricing tailored to your specific situation.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common ants (up to ½ inch), typically black or dark brown, and leave behind sawdust-like frass near wooden structures. You may also hear rustling sounds inside walls or see winged ants (swarmers) in spring, indicating an established colony on your Rye property.

faqs.question: Can carpenter ants cause serious damage to my Rye home?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants can cause significant structural damage over time by excavating galleries through wood to build their nests. This is especially concerning for Rye's historic homes and waterfront properties where moisture and mature trees provide ideal conditions for infestations to grow undetected.
